schemes.name: Abdul Kalam Technology Innovation National Fellowship
schemes.description: Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE) will award "Abdul Kalam Technology Innovation National Fellowship" to outstanding engineers to recognize, encourage and support translational research by individuals to achieve excellence in engineering, innovation and technology development.

schemes.name: AlCTE - Distinguished Professional Scheme
schemes.description: AICTE-Distinguished Professionals Scheme has been launched by the All India Council for Technical Education, Ministry of Education to improve the quality of Technical Education in India by utilizing the expertise of Professionals, Emeritus professors & Eminent Personalities to share their knowledge.

schemes.name: ASEAN-India Research Training Fellowship
schemes.description: The âASEAN-India Research Training Fellowship (AI-RTF)â is a fellowship scheme initiated by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India under ASEAN-India Science & Technology Development Fund to support young talented researchers/scientists of ASEAN member countries.

schemes.name: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta Evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana
schemes.description: The scheme aims to enhance India's manufacturing capabilities and exports of traditional medicines and health promotion products under the initiative of Atmanirbhar Bharat.

schemes.name: Deen Dayal SPARSH Yojana (Scholarship For Promotion Of Aptitude & Research In Stamps As A Hobby)
schemes.description: "Deen Dayal SPARSH Yojana" awards annual scholarships to students who have good academic records and are also pursuing 'Philately' as a hobby. The objective is to âPromote Philately among children at a young age in a sustainable manner that can reinforce and supplement the academic curriculum.

schemes.name: Dr. D.S. Kothari Post Doctoral Fellowships In Sciences
schemes.description: Dr. D.S. Kothari Post Doctoral Fellowships in Sciences was introduced by the UGC. In addition to the existing RA/PDF positions provided by various funding agencies, a need was felt for a PDF scheme running in a flexible mode, with fast track, online handling, and decision-making.

schemes.name: Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide financial incentives for manufacturing electronic components in Bharat. Through this scheme, turnover and capital expenditure-linked incentives are provided to companies and Limited Liability Partnerships.

schemes.name: E-YUVA Scheme: BIRACâs Innovation Fellows (for post graduates and above)
schemes.description: BIRACâs Innovation fellows shall apply as an individual and are required to work full time at EYC. BIRACâs Innovation Fellows are expected to initiate biotech startups. Hence, only proposals with potential to commercialize innovative products and technologies will be considered for support.

schemes.name: Fund of Funds for Startups
schemes.description: Launched in January 2016 under Startup India, the Fund of Funds for Startups is managed by SIDBI. It supports DPIIT-recognized startups indirectly by investing in SEBI-registered AIFs, which must invest at least twice the FFS contribution.

schemes.name: High Risk - High Reward Research
schemes.description: The Scheme for Funding "High Risk - High Reward Research" aims at supporting proposals that are conceptually new & risky, & if successful, expected to have a paradigm-shifting influence on the S&T.

schemes.name: IGSTC Industrial Fellowship- PhD Industrial Exposure Fellowship
schemes.description: The Indo-German Science & Technology Centre (IGSTC) Industrial Fellowship Programme was launched by Secretary, Department of Science and Technology, Govt. of India on the occasion of IGSTCâs 11th Foundation Day on 14th June 2021 to support young Indian researchers for industrial exposure in Germany.

schemes.name: IGSTC Industrial Fellowship- Post Doctoral Industrial Fellowship
schemes.description: This programme is aimed at encouraging Postdoctoral researchers/fresh PhDs in S&T with appreciable track record and having aptitude for applied research and technology development.

schemes.name: India BPO Promotion Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to create employment opportunities and promote investment in the IT/ITeS sector by establishing BPO/ITeS units in smaller cities. Through this scheme, financial support in the form of Viability Gap Funding is provided to eligible companies.

schemes.name: Indo-French Postdoctoral Research Programme for Women in Science
schemes.description: This programme will provide a platform for women candidates to engage & work with Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

schemes.name: Indo-French Visiting/Mobility Programme for Women in Science
schemes.description: This programme will encourage women candidates to work with the Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

schemes.name: Industrial R&D Promotion Programme: Recognition Of In-House R&D Units
schemes.description: DSIR is operating a scheme called "Recognition of In-House R&D Units" with the objective of granting recognition & registration to in-house R&D units established by the corporate industry. The In-house R&D units are expected to be engaged in innovative research & development activities.

schemes.name: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Faculty Fellowship
schemes.description: The "INSPIRE FACULTY FELLOWSHIP" component provides opportunities to 100 persons every year with Ph.D. qualifications in the age group of 27-32 years for 5 years to carry out research in both basic and applied science areas including engineering, medicine, agriculture, and veterinary sciences.

schemes.name: J.C. Bose Fellowship
schemes.description: The âJ.C. Bose fellowshipâ is awarded to active scientists in recognition of their outstanding performance. The fellowship is scientist-specific and very selective.

schemes.name: Junior Research Fellowship In Engineering & Technology
schemes.description: The scheme "Junior Research Fellowship in Engineering & Technology" by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education is meant for candidates who wish to pursue research leading to a Ph.D. degree in engineering and technology.

schemes.name: Junior Research Fellowship In Sciences, Humanities, And Social Sciences
schemes.description: The scheme of Junior Research Fellowship in Sciences, Humanities, and Social Science by UGC, Dept. of Education, is open to candidates who qualify for the National Eligibility Test-Junior Research Fellowship(NET-JRF) of the UGC and the UGC-Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (UGC-CSIR).

schemes.name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana
schemes.description: The KVPY is a national fellowship program in basic sciences, initiated and funded by the Department of Science and Technology to attract exceptionally motivated students to pursue basic science courses and a research career in science.

schemes.name: Mobility Scheme
schemes.description: The Mobility Scheme is aimed to provide an opportunity to women scientists who are facing difficulties in their present job due to relocation (marriage, transfer of husband to any other location within the country, attending ailing parents, and accompanying children studying in different city).

schemes.name: National Centre for Communication Security (NCCS) Research Associates Scheme
schemes.description: NCCS engages young scholars as Research Associates  to contribute in development of Telecom Security eco system with in India by providing an opportunity to them to work in areas like Telecom Security Standard development, Lab recognition and Security Certification of telecom products.

schemes.name: National Grassroots Innovation and Outstanding Traditional Knowledge Awards
schemes.description: National Innovation Foundation (NIF)-India, an autonomous body of the Department of Science and Technology, Government of India, invites entries of unaided technological innovations and traditional knowledge developed at grassroots by an individual (Citizen of India) or group.

schemes.name: National Post Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.description: The âNational Post Doctoral Fellowship (N-PDF)â was launched by the Science and Engineering Research Board, Government of India to identify motivated young researchers and provide them support for doing research in frontier areas of science and engineering.

schemes.name: National Science Chair- Science Leadership
schemes.description: The main aim of the scheme is to recognise active eminent senior resident Indian superannuated scientists for their outstanding contributions both nationally and internationally, in the areas of Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics (STEM) & Medicine, to promote excellence and growth in R&D.

schemes.name: National Science Chair- Scientific Excellence
schemes.description: The main aim of the scheme is to recognize active eminent senior resident Indian superannuated scientists for their outstanding contributions both nationally and internationally, in the areas of Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics (STEM) & Medicine, to promote excellence and growth in R&D.

schemes.name: National Technology Awards
schemes.description: The National Technology Awards refer to an event or program that recognizes and celebrates technological innovation and excellence across various industries within a particular country.

schemes.name: Overseas Visiting Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.description: The objective of the scheme is to build national capacity in frontier areas of Science and Engineering, which are of interest to India by providing research training to PhD students admitted in the Indian institutions in overseas universities / institutions of repute.

schemes.name: Paired Early Career Fellowship in Applied Research
schemes.description: PECFAR is a fellowship to facilitate a two-way exchange of young early-career Indian and German researchers through short visits for networking and exploring avenues for collaboration and innovation in applied research.

schemes.name: Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant
schemes.description: This programme is initiated by the Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF) to assist researchers to initiate their research career in a new institution with a flexible budget and progressive initiatives for ease of doing research.

schemes.name: Prime Ministerâs Fellowship for Doctoral Research
schemes.description: Prime Ministerâs Fellowship for Doctoral Research scheme is a prestigious initiative of Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), Department of Science & Technology, Government of India towards the advancement of university research engagements in line with industry requirement.

schemes.name: PRISM (Promoting Innovations in Individuals, Start-ups and MSMEs): Category-2: Fabrication of Working Model/Process Know-how/Testing & Trial/Patenting/Technology Transfer
schemes.description: The scheme aims to promote innovations in individuals, start-ups, and Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (PRISM). It offers financial support (up to â¹20,00,000/-) for Indian Citizens working on innovation projects requiring fabrication of working models, patenting, or technology transfer.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive Scheme (PLI) For Promoting Telecom & Networking Products Manufacturing In India
schemes.description: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme aims to boost domestic manufacturing, investments and export in the telecom and networking products The PLI Scheme will be implemented within the overall financial limits of â¹ 12,195 Crores only (Rupees Twelve Thousand One Hundred and Ninety-Five Crore only)

schemes.name: Raman-Charpak Fellowship
schemes.description: The âRaman-Charpak Fellowship Programmeâ is in honour of two Nobel Laureates in Physics, Prof C.V. Raman, Indian Nobel Laureate (1930) & Prof Georges Charpak, French Nobel Laureate (1992). The Fellowship was launched during the State visit of the President of France to India in February, 2013.

schemes.name: Ramanujan Fellowship
schemes.description: "Ramanujan Fellowship" was started by the Science and Engineering Research Board, Govt. of India for brilliant Indian scientists and engineers from outside India to take up scientific research positions in India, those Indian scientists/engineers who want to return to India from abroad.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar
schemes.description: The objective of the Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar (RVP) is to recognise the notable and inspiring contribution made by the scientists, technologists and innovators individually or in teams in various fields of science, technology and technology- led innovation.

schemes.name: SERB - POWER Fellowship
schemes.description: The SERB - POWER Fellowship is designed to identify and reward excellent women researchers in Indian academic institutions and R&D laboratories, holding Ph.D. degrees in any branch of science and engineering.

schemes.name: SERB - POWER Research Grants
schemes.description: The aim of the âSERB - POWER Research Grantsâ is to encourage emerging and eminent women researchers for individual-centric and competitive mode of research funding to undertake R&D activities in frontier areas of science and engineering.

schemes.name: SERB International Research Experience
schemes.description: The Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), a statutory body under the Department of Science and Technology, Government of India has launched "SERB International Research Experience (SIRE)".

schemes.name: SERB Research Scientist Scheme
schemes.description: SERB Board has launched a new âSERB Research Scientist (SRS) Schemeâ for the awardees of INSPIRE Faculty and Ramanujan Fellowships, who fail to secure regular positions after completion of the regular tenure of five years in the respective schemes.

schemes.name: SERB-Technology Translation Award
schemes.description: The âSERB-Technology Translation Award (SERB-TETRA)â is a new scheme launched by the Science and Engineering Research Board, Government of India for catalyzing technology translation in academic settings.

schemes.name: Sukhatme National Award in Statistics
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Statistics and Programme Implementation
schemes.description: The scheme aims to recognise excellence in statistical research and official statistics. Through this scheme, national recognition is provided to eligible Indian statisticians for lifetime or young achiever contributions.

schemes.name: Swarnajayanti Fellowships Scheme
schemes.description: Under this scheme, a selected number of young scientists, with proven track record, are provided special assistance and support to enable them to pursue basic research in frontier areas of science and technology.

schemes.name: Teachers Associateship for Research Excellence
schemes.description: The scheme âTeachers Associateship for Research Excellence (TARE)â was launched by Science & Engineering Research Board, Department of Science & Technology, Government of India which aims to facilitate mobility of faculty members working in State Universities /Colleges/Private Academic institutions.

schemes.name: TEC Internship Scheme
schemes.description: The âTEC Internship Schemeâ intends to engage 25 Interns in order to study/formulate/operationalize/assess various works/projects/policies etc. The internship will provide an opportunity for young scholars to contribute to the TEC work and have insight into the related technical work.

schemes.name: Technology Development And Utilization Programme For Women
schemes.description: In order to meet the specific needs of women and to enhance the contribution of women towards technology capability building, the âTechnology Development & Utilization Programme for Women (TDUPW)â has been formulated by the Department of Scientific and Industrial Research (DSIR).

schemes.name: Telecom Technology Development Fund
schemes.description:
The Telecom Technology Development Fund Scheme (hereinafter referred to as âSchemeâ) has been
notified for domestic companies and institutions involved in technology design, development,
commercialization of telecommunication products and solutions to enable affordable broadband and mobile services.

schemes.name: VAIshwik BHArtiya Vaigyanik (VAIBHAV) Fellowship
schemes.description:
VAIBHAV Fellowship envisages collaboration between scientists of Indian Diaspora with
Indian Higher Educational Institutions/Universities/Public Funded Scientific
Institutions. Fellow would identify an Indian Institution for collaboration &
may spend upto two months in a year for a max. of 3 years.

schemes.name: Visiting Advanced Joint Research Faculty Scheme
schemes.description: VAJRA Faculty Scheme is a dedicated program exclusively for overseas scientists and academicians with emphasis on NRI and Persons of Indian Origin/Overseas Citizen of India to work as adjunct/visiting faculty for a specific period of time in Indian Public funded academic and research institutions.

schemes.name: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Full Time PhD Candidates
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims at generating a total of 1000 Full-time PhD Candidates in emerging research areas of Electronic System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) and IT/IT Enabled Services (ITES) sectors over a period of 5 years.

schemes.name: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Part Time PhD Candidates
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims at generating a total of 150 Part-time PhDs in emerging research areas of Electronics System Design & Manufacturing (ESDM) and IT/IT Enabled Services (IT/ITES) sectors over a period of 5 years.

schemes.name: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Post-Doctoral Fellowships (PDF)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: This fellowship is meant for those who have a proven track record as evident from their research publications & recognitions. Support is provided for 225 Post-Doctoral Fellowships for candidates for a period of 1 year, to encourage specialized research in emerging area.

schemes.name: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Young Faculty Research Fellowships
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: This fellowship is meant for Young Faculty having regular position at their institution and proven track record in research. Support is provisioned for 50 candidates, for an initial period of support of 2 years, extendible till 5 years based on performance review.

schemes.name: WISE Fellowship for Ph.D.
schemes.description: The "WISE Fellowship for Ph.D. (WISE-PhD)" of the Department of Science and Technology aims to provide an opportunity to carry out Doctoral research in basic and applied sciences to women scientists and technologists between the age group of 27-45 years who want to pursue research in STEM fields.

schemes.name: WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.description: âWISE Post-Doctoral Fellowshipâ is a new programme of the Department of Science & Technology that aims to provide opportunities to women scientists & technologists between the age group of 27-60 years who want to continue their research as bench-level scientists in basic and applied sciences.

schemes.name: Women In Science and Engineering-Societal Challenges with Opportunities Fellowship
schemes.description: The âWISE-SCOPE Fellowshipâ Program was started by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India with the aims to provide opportunity to Women Scientists and Technologists who have completed Ph.D. and want to utilize their S&T knowledge and expertise for the benefit of society.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-A
schemes.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering, preferably those having a break in career (minimum two years) and not having regular employment, to explore possibility of re-entry into the profession.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-B
schemes.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates with break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. Women scientists who wish to apply under this scheme are required to develop their own project/proposals for scientific and technological solutions

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-C
schemes.description: A scheme by MoST for female candidates with a break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. 1-year training is provided in Intellectual Property Rights (IPRs), patent search, know-how, drafting, filing, trademarks, trade secrets, and copyright.

schemes.name: Womenâs Instinct for Developing and Ushering in Scientific Heights & Innovation
schemes.description: 'WIDUSHI' programme aims to encourage and support senior women scientists to conduct research in interdisciplinary areas of Science and Technology.
